a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Per capita CO₂ emissions including land-use change, 2023

Emissions include those from
fossil fuels and industry
, and land-use change. They are measured in tonnes.
Data source: Global Carbon Budget (2024); Population based on various sources (2024)
Note: Emissions from land-use change can be positive or negative depending on whether carbon is emitted or sequestered.
